title: Better Animations
description: Overhaul your Minecraft player animations and bring them to life!
body:
[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-animations) [![Organization](https://img.shields.io/badge/Organization-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=black)](https://modrinth.com/organization/cre8to-team) [![Feedback](https://img.shields.io/badge/feedback%20form%20(no%20login)-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=googleforms&color=indigo)](https://forms.gle/fkgMp6YroGjwH8Nr5) [![Donate@CupOfCoffee](https://img.shields.io/badge/donate%20a%20cup%20of%20coffee-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=patreon&color=black)](https://patreon.com/cre8to) **Better Expressions** has been moved! Get it [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-expressions)! ## 📘 DESCRIPTION *Buttery Smooth!* Overhaul your Minecraft player animations and bring them to life! Compatible with almost all animation mods! Including Better Combat, Quark and Emotecraft emotes and Parcool! Supports both **Fabric** and **Forge** ## ⚙️ INSTALLATION * Download the latest `Better_Animations.zip` file from the versions tab. * Download the required mods from the **Dependencies** tab. * Place the mods and the resourcepack in the appropriate folder. (e.g. `%appdata%/.minecraft/`) * Activate the resourcepack from the **Resource Packs** screen in-game. ## ❗ DEPENDENCIES [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ## 📜 CREDITS [MincraftEinstein](https://modrinth.com/user/MincraftEinstein), [Qboi](https://modrinth.com/user/Qboi), Prairies, Mysty, SomeOddBall, Brosiyeah, YaBoiMoh, Quackinsons, Jeanne ## 🧩 COMPATIBILITY **Works with!** — ﻿[playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator), [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat), [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft), [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark), [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers), [ParCool!](https://modrinth.com/mod/parcool), [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations), [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) **Doesn't work with :(** — Improved Animations, [Serious Player Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/serious-player-animations) and any other cem model mod besides EMF+ETF
[![Banner](https://github.com/Creatomat/creatomat.github.io/blob/main/cre8to_1.png?raw=true)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2788)
